properties.name: upper_sse_rim_bench
properties.description: Shallow bench cut above outer row band — softens steep rim, supplies fill

properties.name: lower_basin_dry_shelf
properties.description: Dry shelf at basin edge — more usable civic ground without erasing cell

properties.name: western_upper_rim_shoulder
properties.description: West rim cut — creates sunset promenade terrace, supplies fill for S02

properties.name: upper_promenade_belvedere
properties.description: West promenade shelf — bay + sunset overlook for non-event civic use

properties.name: forecourt_trim
properties.description: Minor forecourt regrade — supplies material for front-row fill

properties.name: front_row_sightline_fill
properties.description: Micro-fill front 5 rows to clear 90mm C-value to nearer focus

properties.name: treatment_cell_edge_excavation
properties.description: Perimeter cut to define cell edge, improve infiltration area

properties.name: raised_forecourt_edge
properties.description: Civic ground-level lip at forecourt entry — improves event-floor presence

properties.name: east_shoulder_cut
properties.description: East side rebalance cut — supplies material for west sunset shoulder

properties.name: west_shoulder_fill
properties.description: West shoulder build-up to strengthen sunset promenade

properties.name: ada_ramp_cut
properties.description: Switchback ramp uphill cut — self-balancing with ramp embankment

properties.name: ada_ramp_embankment
properties.description: Switchback ramp downhill embankment — accepts spoil from ramp cut

properties.name: treatment_cell_core
properties.description: Treatment cell — preserve stormwater function; no fill without storage replacement

properties.name: bay_view_corridor
properties.description: Upstage bay-view sightline corridor — no fill/obstruction above stage floor

properties.name: seating_rows_on_natural_grade
properties.description: Rows 1-12 already on natural grade — penalise any substantial fill

properties.name: se_corner_fill
properties.description: SE corner fill terrace — terrain 1-4 ft below row targets; receives spoil from south_borrow

properties.name: south_borrow
properties.description: South arc borrow — terrain 3-8 ft above row targets beyond row 16; primary cut source for SE fill

properties.name: se_row17_ext
properties.description: Row 17 extension shelf — R=130-136 ft across eastern fan; modest fill needed on SE side
